song.title: I've Got Rivers of Life
song.presentation: v1 c v2 c v3 c
song.lyrics: [v1] Christ has come to be life, The Processed, Divine Trinity. God the Father’s the Source, A Fountain emerging to be - God the Son as a gushing up spring And the Spirit a river for life imparting. Oh how can this be, a great mystery, The Triune God flowing in me? [c] O I’ve got rivers of life Flowing out of my innermost being! I’ve got rivers of life Flowing out of my innermost being! [v2] So I’ve no cause to frown, As one who received this zoe. I know life runs its course, And triumphs inevitably. I’m required just to stay in the flow. If I do the drinking, then God gives the growth. So there’s joy in my heart, and a spring in my step, And a smile on my face as I sing - [v3] Yet this life, though it frees, Is not meant for mere victory. God is full of intent, And never could flow aimlessly. So this life moves and grows within me From my spirit within to my soul and body, Now His life is expressed, to the world manifest; Gushing up unto eternity!
